mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( order_code, member_no, orderer_name, orderer_hp, total_price, discount_price, coupon_discount, delivery_fee, point_use, point_save, pay_price, payment_method, payment_status, paid_date, cancel_date, order_status, order_date ) VALUES ( #{orderCode}, #{memberNo}, #{ordererName}, #{ordererHp}, #{totalPrice}, #{discountPrice}, #{couponDiscount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{pointUse}, #{pointSave}, #{payPrice}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, NOW(), NULL, #{orderStatus}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO delivery ( order_no, seller_no, receiver_name, receiver_hp, zip, addr1, addr2, courier, invoice_no, delivery_fee, delivery_status, memo, receipt_date, shipped_date, delivered_date ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{sellerNo}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverHp}, #{zip}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{courier}, #{invoiceNo}, #{deliveryFee}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{memo}, NOW(), NULL, NULL )

INSERT INTO order_item ( order_no, delivery_no, product_no, seller_no, product_name, product_image, price, discount_rate, coupon_discount, point, quantity, total_price, item_status, purchase_confirm_date ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{deliveryNo}, #{productNo}, #{sellerNo}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{price}, #{discountRate}, #{couponDiscount}, #{point}, #{quantity}, #{totalPrice}, #{itemStatus}, NULL )
INSERT INTO order_item_option ( order_item_no, option_group_no, option_name, option_value ) VALUES ( #{orderItemNo}, #{optionGroupNo}, #{optionName}, #{optionValue} )

INSERT INTO member_point ( member_no, order_no, point_type, point_value, balance_point, reason, expire_date ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{orderNo}, #{pointType}, #{pointValue}, #{balancePoint}, #{reason}, #{expireDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT order_no AS orderNo, order_code AS orderCode, member_no AS memberNo, orderer_name AS ordererName, orderer_hp AS ordererHp, total_price AS totalPrice, discount_price AS discountPrice, coupon_discount AS couponDiscount, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, point_use AS pointUse, point_save AS pointSave, pay_price AS payPrice, payment_method AS paymentMethod, payment_status AS paymentStatus, paid_date AS paidDate, order_status AS orderStatus, order_date AS orderDate FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo}

SELECT order_item_no AS orderItemNo, order_no AS orderNo, delivery_no AS deliveryNo, product_no AS productNo, seller_no AS sellerNo, product_name AS productName, product_image AS productImage, price AS price, discount_rate AS discountRate, coupon_discount AS couponDiscount, point AS point, quantity AS quantity, total_price AS totalPrice, item_status AS itemStatus, purchase_confirm_date AS purchaseConfirmDate FROM order_item WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY order_item_no ASC

SELECT delivery_no AS deliveryNo, order_no AS orderNo, seller_no AS sellerNo, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_hp AS receiverHp, zip AS zip, addr1 AS addr1, addr2 AS addr2, courier AS courier, invoice_no AS invoiceNo, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, delivery_status AS deliveryStatus, memo AS memo, receipt_date AS receiptDate, shipped_date AS shippedDate, delivered_date AS deliveredDate FROM delivery WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} ORDER BY delivery_no ASC LIMIT 1
